findings.description: Tasks 2+3 merged because types and parser share a test surface — can't test parsing without types
findings.proposedRule: Merge tightly coupled tasks at build time when they share a test surface

findings.description: Schema validator accepts fs.FS instead of embed.FS, enabling trivial testing with fstest.MapFS
findings.proposedRule: Components reading embedded files accept fs.FS (not embed.FS) for testability

findings.description: schemas/toolwright.schema.json deferred — no production consumer exists yet. Tests use inline fstest.MapFS.
findings.proposedRule: Defer embedded assets until a production consumer exists; use fstest.MapFS in tests

findings.description: Used type authAlias Auth to avoid infinite recursion in custom UnmarshalYAML that supports scalar + object
findings.proposedRule: Use type alias inside UnmarshalYAML to decode mapping nodes without infinite recursion

findings.description: Go omitempty treats nil and empty slice the same; custom MarshalYAML needed to preserve args: [] vs omitted
findings.proposedRule: Add custom MarshalYAML with non-omitempty alias when empty-slice semantics matter

findings.description: 4 INFO findings about unused exports — all expected for a foundation unit in a leaf-first build
findings.proposedRule: Foundation unit wiring INFO about unused exports is expected; resolves as downstream units consume them
